steps.title: Set the expressions equal
steps.content: The condition $f(k)=3k$ means $|61-2k|=3k$. Because $3k$ must be nonnegative, solve the absolute value equation by cases.

steps.title: Solve both cases
steps.content: Use both possible equations: $61-2k=3k$ gives $k=\frac{61}{5}$, and $61-2k=-3k$ gives $k=-61$. The negative value does not satisfy $3k\ge 0$.

steps.title: Match the solution
steps.content: The listed value that satisfies the equation is $\frac{61}{5}$. The answer is A.
